purpose: Commercial identity, organization, membership, role, billing ownership, and user wallet management model.
machineBoundary: User, organization, membership, billing owner, wallet, role, disabled status, and management API shape.

lifecycle.removalCondition: Replace only with a newer current contract for the same boundary.

billingAccount.source: billing ownership identity used by Workspaces and Ledger records

workspaceOwnership.personalWorkspace: ownerAccountId is the user billing account id and userId identifies the wallet owner
workspaceOwnership.organizationWorkspace: ownerAccountId is organization.billingAccountId and userId must have active membership
